name: Estoril Sol, SGPS, S.A.
summary: Estoril-Sol, SGPS, S.A., through its subsidiaries, engages in the gaming, food and beverage, animation and entertainment, and real estate businesses. It owns gaming casinos, including casino do Estoril, Casino Lisboa, and Casino da P√É¬≥voa de Varzim. The company is also involved in the online gambling and sports betting activities. In addition, it owns a plot of land in Monte Estoril. The company was founded in 1958 and is headquartered in Estoril, Portugal. Estoril-Sol, SGPS, S.A. is a subsidiary of Finansol - Sociedade de Controlo, SGPS, S.A.
